name: plasticman-vs-flash
description: Plastic Man vs The Flash — Schrödinger's Showdown. Vite + React front end with an Express backend that proxies OpenAI, runs a Qiskit Hadamard-and-measure collapse, and hosts a live WebSocket poll.

scripts.setup:quantum: python3.11 -m venv server/quantum/.venv && server/quantum/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -q --upgrade pip && server/quantum/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -q -r server/quantum/requirements.txt
